name: _Group_Tool_Executor
content: Plan comparator decision recorded: reuse=False, restart_at_step=1. The new plan significantly restructures the workflow, changing the order of operations (e.g., performing data splitting and normalization before model training, and moving the cILC baseline implementation to after the model training). The new plan also simplifies the scope by removing the OOD stress testing and the transition to a Conditional Diffusion Model (CDM). Since the sequence of tasks and the dependencies between them have changed, it is safer to restart the execution to ensure the new data pipeline and model training logic are implemented correctly from the beginning.
